domain: Test-Time Compute Scaling and Inference-Time Reasoning for SLMs
validation_sources: Hacker News (multiple threads on test-time compute, s1 budget forcing, recursive reasoning with tiny networks)
GitHub repos (HuggingFace search-and-learn 1.1k stars, Awesome-Inference-Time-Scaling, LLM-MCTS-Inference, PaCoRe)
Reddit/LocalLLaMA community discussions on small model reasoning
Academic papers (rStar-Math, SLM-MUX, Dynasor, PaCoRe, Chain of Draft)
Industry blogs (NVIDIA Dynamo, Sebastian Raschka, Lilian Weng)
HuggingFace community (test-time compute scaling recipes, Llama 3B outperforming 70B)

validated_gaps.title: Unified SLM Reasoning SDK: Search + PRM + Serving in One Package
demand_signals: HuggingFace search-and-learn (1.1k stars) only covers search algorithms, NOT PRM training or serving
OpenR covers search+PRM but NOT production serving — GitHub shows active issues requesting serving integration
Multiple awesome-lists (5+ repos with 500+ stars each) trying to organize fragmented landscape indicates users are confused
PaCoRe (StepFun) achieves GPT-5-beating results with 8B model but is research-only, showing demand for productionizing
Sebastian Raschka's newsletter 'State of LLM Reasoning Model Inference' widely shared, indicating practitioner interest in unified view

validated_gaps.title: On-Device / Edge Reasoning Search for SLMs
demand_signals: HN thread 'Show HN: Tool that automates ML model deployment on mobile/edge devices' — active discussion
ACM survey 'Edge Large Language Models: Design, Execution, Applications' — comprehensive need documented
Liquid AI LFM2.5-1.2B for on-device, but NO reasoning search — gap explicitly visible
Phi-4-mini runs at 12+ tokens/sec on iPhone 14 but with greedy decoding only — no search
DeepSeek-R1 1.5B distillation for edge exists but no MCTS/beam search framework for it
HN 'Less is more: Recursive reasoning with tiny networks' — 100+ comments showing interest

validated_gaps.title: Adaptive Compute Budget Controller for SLM Reasoning
demand_signals: Dynasor paper achieves 50% compute savings + 3.3x throughput — proves value but not productionized
s1 budget forcing paper is ICLR 2025 Oral — high academic impact, shows community values this
arxiv survey 'Reasoning on a Budget: Adaptive and Controllable Test-Time Compute' (Jul 2025) — entire survey on this gap
OpenAI o1/o3 offers thinking token budget as key feature — validates market demand
Anthropic Claude 3.7 'thinking budget' parameter — major vendor validates need
Multiple blog posts discussing cost of reasoning models in production — practitioners feel the pain

validated_gaps.title: SLM-Specific Process Reward Model Training Toolkit
demand_signals: Paper 'Lessons of Developing Process Reward Models' documents challenges — training is hard
PRM training requires expensive step-level annotations — major bottleneck documented
RLHF-Reward-Modeling repo provides recipes but not SLM-optimized
axolotl PRM support exists but not tuned for small models under memory constraints
Active research on efficient PRM data (Active Learning for PRM, InversePRM) — shows need for easier training

validated_gaps.title: Reasoning Distillation Pipeline: Large Reasoner -> Small Reasoner
demand_signals: Red Hat blog 'Lessons reproducing R1-like reasoning in small LLMs' — practitioners actively trying this
STILL-2 framework (imitate-explore-self-improve) shows pipeline exists in research but not productionized
s1 achieves strong results with only 1000 training examples — shows pipeline could be simple
Phi-4 trained via distillation from o3-mini — validates the approach at Microsoft scale
HuggingFace lewtun: 'We outperform Llama 70B with Llama 3B' — strong community excitement
Chain of Thought Distillation paper from Calmops — growing interest in smaller reasoning models

validated_gaps.title: Reasoning Quality Observability & Monitoring
demand_signals: Arize AI blog on 'Sleep-time Compute' discusses observability needs for reasoning
No existing MLOps tool (Weights & Biases, MLflow, Arize) has reasoning-specific monitoring
OpenAI's 'Evaluating chain-of-thought monitorability' paper — they acknowledge the problem
Production teams lack visibility into WHY reasoning models fail on specific queries

validated_gaps.title: Multi-SLM Reasoning Ensemble with Routing
demand_signals: SLM-MUX paper (2025) — 13.4% improvement on MATH proves value of SLM ensembling
Cost-latency constrained routing research (Harvard) — active research on routing decisions
Multiple cloud providers offer model routing but NOT reasoning-strategy routing
Aladdin system (71% GPU cost savings with routing) — validates cost savings potential

validated_gaps.title: Domain-Specific Reasoning Enhancement for SLMs (Beyond Math)
demand_signals: Nearly ALL benchmarks (MATH, AIME, GSM8K, GPQA) focus on math/science — acknowledged limitation
AgentPRM paper proposes PRMs for LLM agents — shows demand beyond math
ReKG-MCTS for knowledge graph reasoning — domain adaptation happening organically
Legal, medical, financial AI companies raising large rounds but using generic models
No domain-specific PRM or search heuristic for non-math reasoning exists

validated_gaps.title: Open-Source Reasoning Benchmark Suite for SLMs
demand_signals: testtimescaling.github.io survey proposes 'how well' dimension but no standardized benchmarks
Papers compare on different subsets making comparison impossible
Awesome-Efficient-Reasoning-LLMs repo (survey) documents fragmented evaluation landscape

validated_gaps.title: Plug-and-Play Reasoning Enhancement Layer for Existing SLMs
demand_signals: HuggingFace search-and-learn is closest but requires specific model compatibility
kyegomez/tree-of-thoughts (2k+ stars) — 'Plug in and Play' in title shows demand for simplicity
LLM-MCTS-Inference repo tested with Llama3.2-1B — shows community trying this ad-hoc
Application developers not ML experts need simple wrappers — underserved segment
Blog posts explaining 'how to add reasoning to your model' are among most shared ML content

validated_gaps.title: Cost-Optimal Reasoning Strategy Selector
demand_signals: Multiple blog posts computing $/query for reasoning vs non-reasoning models
Research shows SLM+MCTS can beat LLM+greedy at lower cost — but no tool helps choose
Seldon, RunPod blogs discuss inference cost optimization as top concern
Jensen Huang: reasoning models need 100x more compute — cost is THE concern

validated_gaps.title: Streaming Reasoning Chains with Progressive Refinement
demand_signals: OpenAI hides thinking tokens — users frustrated about lack of transparency
DeepSeek-R1 shows full CoT but no progressive refinement — all or nothing
Chain of Draft paper (Feb 2025) — 'Thinking Faster by Writing Less' shows demand for efficiency
UX research on streaming AI responses — users prefer progressive disclosure

validated_gaps.title: Hybrid Edge-Cloud Reasoning Orchestration
demand_signals: ACM survey on 'Collaborative Inference and Learning between Edge SLMs and Cloud LLMs' (Jul 2025)
CLONE framework for edge latency-aware inference — research validates approach
Edge-cloud collaboration described as 'SLMs as first-response agents, offloading complex reasoning to cloud'
Intermittent connectivity use case (healthcare, field ops) well documented
No production system implements this yet

validated_gaps.title: Reasoning-Aware Quantization and Pruning
demand_signals: Phi-4-mini achieves 12+ tok/s on mobile with 4-bit quantization — but reasoning quality impact unknown
Edge deployment requires quantization — standard methods known to degrade reasoning disproportionately
Research paper 'Demystifying SLMs for Edge Deployment' discusses optimization but not reasoning-specific

validated_gaps.title: Interactive Reasoning Debugger for SLMs
demand_signals: LLM Reasoners has ReasonerAgent-Web visualization but basic
SC-MCTS* paper notes interpretability as key challenge
Prompt engineering guides discuss ToT debugging as manual process

validated_gaps.title: Self-Improving SLM Reasoning Loop (Online Learning)
demand_signals: ThetaEvolve paper — test-time learning with continual self-improvement
STILL-2 self-improvement loop — research validates approach
Awesome-LLM-Self-Improvement repo (curated list) — active research area
No production system does this yet

validated_gaps.title: Multi-Modal Reasoning at Test-Time for SLMs
demand_signals: Phi-4-reasoning-vision exists but without search enhancement
Awesome-Efficient-LRM-Reasoning survey covers multimodal — acknowledged gap
NVIDIA Dynamo 1.0 adds video generation but not multi-modal reasoning

validated_gaps.title: Reasoning Chain Compression / Efficient CoT for SLMs
demand_signals: Chain of Draft paper — 'Thinking Faster by Writing Less' — high interest
'Fast Thinking for LLMs' paper — reducing unnecessary reasoning tokens
SpecReason achieves 1.5-2.5x speedup while improving accuracy — validates approach
'When More is Less: Understanding CoT Length' paper — over-reasoning documented as problem
Energy concerns: 'Energy Use of AI Inference' paper documents test-time compute energy costs
